scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "green,blue" "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "green,blue" "npm --prefix server run build" "npm --prefix client run build"
scripts.preview: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "green,blue" "npm --prefix server run preview" "npm --prefix client run preview"
